task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard, app menu, or any Odoo application interface is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the meeting creation form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal or page for creating a new calendar event/meeting is visible in the Odoo interface.
The text 'Career Coaching Session - Emma Thompson' is entered in the Meeting Subject or Title field.

task_completion.description: Meeting time and duration are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The meeting date is set to next Wednesday, with the start time at 15:00 (3:00 PM) and end time at 16:00 (4:00 PM), or the duration is explicitly shown as 1 hour.

task_completion.description: Emma Thompson is added as an attendee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Emma Thompson' appears as a selected tag or entry in the Attendees field of the meeting form.

The meeting appears as a scheduled block on the Calendar view for next Wednesday at 3:00 PM, or the meeting form is in a saved state (e.g., 'Save' button is no longer active, or the view switches to a read-only summary).

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo interface, not a terminal executing Python, curl, or XML-RPC commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8069 and the standard Odoo 17 interface is visible.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Odoo 17 is running at http://localhost:8069. The agent must log in with admin/admin. The meeting must be titled 'Career Coaching Session - Emma Thompson', scheduled for next Wednesday at 3:00 PM (15:00) for 1 hour, with 'Emma Thompson' as an attendee. Emma Thompson is a pre-existing contact (email: emma.thompson@northbridge.org, job position: Product Manager).
